description: Ground truth overlap map for the 14 fragmented skills

csv_data_loader.note: CSV loading is a subset of data_ingestion_service

excel_data_reader.note: Excel loading is a subset of data_ingestion_service

data_ingestion_service.note: Superset that covers CSV, Excel, JSON, Parquet ingestion

null_value_processor.note: Null handling is one operation within data_cleaning_toolkit

data_deduplicator.note: Deduplication is one operation within data_cleaning_toolkit

data_cleaning_toolkit.note: Superset covering nulls, dedup, type coercion, outliers

schema_validator.note: Schema checks (types, nullability) overlap with business_rule_checker's type and constraint checks

business_rule_checker.note: Business rules overlap with schema validation on type/constraint checks; adds referential integrity

numeric_normalizer.note: Normalization is a form of feature transformation; overlaps on numeric column processing

feature_calculator.note: Feature calculation includes some normalization-like operations (log transform, scaling)

data_aggregator.note: Generic aggregation engine; summary_report_generator does specific aggregations for reporting

summary_report_generator.note: Specialized aggregation+reporting; uses same group-by logic as data_aggregator

csv_export_writer.note: CSV export is a subset of multi_format_exporter

multi_format_exporter.note: Superset covering CSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel export
